corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: أَحْرَصَ must be reviewed as the exact finite/elative surface in context, not as the entry infinitive "to be keen"
drill_prompt: Explain why أَحْرَصَ cannot be certified from the hover "to be keen" without finite/POS/context review.
learner_explanation: A learner needs the exact token form and context, not only the root-family meaning.
nahw_lesson: Sentence role and comparison/context can change whether a form is verbal, adjectival, or elative; two compatible reasons are required.
sarf_lesson: Finite or form-sensitive rows require surface, POS, form, and agreement before entry prose can teach a hover.
what_failed: VN-13 dogfood found populated entry prose where exact form/POS/context was not yet certified.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: سُهُولِهَا must preserve the noun host and the هَا possessor/referent before a learner-safe hover is certified
drill_prompt: Segment سُهُولِهَا and explain why "plains" is host-only.
learner_explanation: The final هَا contributes its/its-like reference; the hover cannot teach only the host noun.
nahw_lesson: The suffix is possessive/referential on a noun host and needs context for exact English.
sarf_lesson: Noun hosts with suffix pronouns must expose host plus suffix, not host-only wording.
what_failed: VN-13 dogfood found a populated noun hover whose visible wording omitted the suffix contribution.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: مَطَرَ must be reviewed as the exact rain noun/context token, not as the infinitive "to rain"
drill_prompt: Classify مَطَرَ by POS/context and reject the infinitive hover.
learner_explanation: A noun/context row can share a root with a verb but should not teach the learner an infinitive unless the token is actually a verb.
nahw_lesson: Case/context and sentence role decide the token contribution; surface/root familiarity is not enough.
sarf_lesson: Strict POS and derivative class must block verb-entry prose on noun rows.
visible_bad_hover: to rain or shower as torment
what_failed: VN-13 dogfood found a known defect where noun/context evidence was displayed as a verb infinitive.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: وَٱلشَّمْسُ needs wāw function, article, host noun, case/state, and rich segmentation before whole-token certification
drill_prompt: Explain why component evidence for شمس does not certify وَٱلشَّمْسُ as a whole token.
learner_explanation: The token contains more than the host noun: wāw and the article are visible grammar pieces.
nahw_lesson: The wāw function and nominal relation must be reviewed before any family-wide propagation.
sarf_lesson: Component candidates improve routing but cannot become whole-token hover proof.
what_failed: VN-13 dogfood found component-only evidence that must stay below whole-token certification.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: بِمُصْرِخِكُمْ must preserve bā', nominal host, كُمْ suffix, and attachment before wording is trusted
drill_prompt: List the preposition, host, and suffix in بِمُصْرِخِكُمْ and explain why a root-family verb gloss is unsafe.
learner_explanation: The token teaches a relation plus a host plus your/you-plural suffix, not only the cry-for-help root family.
nahw_lesson: Preposition-host-suffix rows require attachment and referent review before English wording.
sarf_lesson: A component/root candidate on a preposition-plus-host token cannot certify the whole written token.
visible_bad_hover: to cry for help; respond to cries
what_failed: VN-13 dogfood found verb-family prose on a preposition plus nominal host plus suffix row.
